message:
fix: Update darwin-x64 build to macos-15-large runner

Replace deprecated macos-13 with macos-15-large to avoid brownouts
and ensure Intel Mac builds continue to work.

GitHub is deprecating macos-13 runners:
https://github.com/actions/runner-images/issues/13046

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -26,7 +26,7 @@ jobs:
             target: aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu
             build: npm run build:napi -- --target aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu
             platform: linux-arm64-gnu
-          - host: macos-13
+          - host: macos-15-large
             target: x86_64-apple-darwin
             build: npm run build:napi -- --target x86_64-apple-darwin
             platform: darwin-x64
